title: Measure ISR and task timing
description: Instrument GPIO toggles or a cycle counter and report worst-case ISR latency and task execution time under load.
body: Use when asked to verify real-time behavior. Actions: add a GPIO set/clear (or read the DWT cycle counter) around the ISR or task body, capture on a logic analyzer/scope under worst-case load, and report max latency and execution time against the budget. Do not report average timing when a hard deadline requires the worst case. This skill exposes capability only and must not flash or reconfigure hardware without runtime permission. Validation signals include a captured worst-case duration within the timing budget. Risk boundary: if no hardware or analyzer is available, report the timing as unverified rather than asserting a deadline is met from estimation alone.
